evidence.quality_dose_response: MONOTONE DECREASING (C0 48 -> M4 47 -> M6 46 -> M7 44 resolved); aggressive = worse quality, no beneficial crossing
evidence.cache_amortization: aggressive recency net saving negative on 9/10 tasks (cache tax dominates)

why_not_A_or_B: A(strong parity) requires conservative oracle gap >~5% surviving noise; the observed gap is BELOW the r=1 SHAM noise null (40.6%) so no credible gap survives. B(weak) requires SOME stable crossing; 0/50 tasks show stable crossing.
precision_requirement_if_pursued: ~10-20 reps/cell to push the noise-null oracle gap below ~10%; 50 tasks x 4 actions x 15 reps = ~3000 paid SWE-agent runs — not justified by any surviving signal
recommendation: Do NOT proceed to trace-conditioned signal learning for this action family. COMPILE A1 (prefix-preserving LINEDEDUP) as a STATIC low-risk optimization primitive within its eligibility region. KILL A2/A3 adaptive-controller thesis (aggressive actions lose after cache+rework tax; recency variants cache-bust).
caveats: provider-$ proxy used (exact cache-aware effective cost available for only 2 arms x 10 tasks); however the negative is ROBUST because it holds even with the generous provider-$ proxy AND the exact-cost cache-amortization sub-analysis agrees
single rep per cell; the SHAM control quantifies the noise floor that single reps cannot overcome
